name: frosh/admin-dashboard
description: Replaces the Shopware administration dashboard with a modular, drag-and-drop widget board. The layout is persisted per-user.

description.de-DE: Ersetzt das Shopware-Administrations-Dashboard durch ein modulares Drag-and-drop-Widget-Board mit Analyse-Diagrammen, Aufgaben und Notizen — pro Benutzer gespeichert.
description.en-GB: Replaces the Shopware administration dashboard with a modular, drag-and-drop widget board featuring analytics charts, operational queues, notes and tasks — saved per user.
